task_completion.description: Verify the scenario directory was created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command (like `mkdir` or `ls`) or a file manager showing the directory '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/s) St Helens Anchor Drag/' exists.

task_completion.description: Verify the time and weather conditions are set correctly in the scenario configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (e.g., nano, vim) editing the scenario file (.ini) showing time set between 22:00 and 04:00, wind speed between 35 and 45 knots, and wind direction at 225 degrees.

task_completion.description: Verify the ownship 'VTS Patrol' is positioned correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for scenario configuration text showing the ownship named 'VTS Patrol' with Latitude between 50.70 and 50.73, and Longitude between -1.05 and -1.00.

task_completion.description: Verify three large anchored vessels are included with zero speed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for scenario configuration text showing three other vessels (Tanker or Bulk Carrier types) with their speed set to 0.

task_completion.description: Verify the dragging vessel 'MV Slippy' is configured with the correct drift.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for scenario configuration text showing a vessel named 'MV Slippy' with a waypoint leg or course set to ~045 degrees (Northeast) and a speed between 0.5 and 1.5 knots.

task_completion.description: Verify the instructor briefing file was created and identifies the dragging vessel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output (e.g., `cat`) showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/instructor_briefing.txt' contains the name 'MV Slippy'.

integrity.description: Ensure the scenario and briefing files were actually saved to disk.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for save confirmation messages in the text editor (e.g., 'Wrote X lines' in nano) or terminal commands like `ls` or `cat` verifying the files exist with content.

integrity.description: Ensure the briefing file is a genuine instructor briefing and not just a copy-paste of the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in '/home/ga/Documents/instructor_briefing.txt' should read like a briefing or simply identify the vessel, rather than containing the exact wording of the task description.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually wrote the scenario configuration rather than just claiming it did.
integrity.visual_evidence: There must be screenshots showing the actual contents of the scenario file (.ini) being edited or viewed, not just a terminal showing the file name.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Scenario directory must be exactly '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/s) St Helens Anchor Drag/'. Wind direction must be 225 degrees (Southwest) and wind speed between 35 and 45 knots. The dragging vessel 'MV Slippy' must have a drift bearing of 45 degrees (Northeast) and a speed between 0.5 and 1.5 knots (up to 2.0 knots is acceptable by the verifier). Briefing file must be at '/home/ga/Documents/instructor_briefing.txt'.
